message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam sequence {
    LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    LifeLineBorderColor #000000
    ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
    ParticipantBorderColor #000000
    ParticipantPadding 20
    BoxPadding 10
}

box "Main process" #LightBlue
    participant "Hook_StartActivity" as Hook_StartActivity
    participant "VirtualCore" as VirtualCore
    participant "VActivityManager" as VActivityManager
end box

box "Server process" #LightGreen
    participant "VActivityManagerService" as VActivityManagerService
    participant "VPackageManagerService" as VPackageManagerService
    participant "ProviderCaller" as ProviderCaller
end box

box "App Client process" #Grey
    participant "StubContentProvider" as StubContentProvider
end box

participant "VRedirectActRequest" as VRedirectActRequest
participant "VActRedirectResult" as VActRedirectResult

Hook_StartActivity -> Hook_StartActivity: onHook
Hook_StartActivity -> VirtualCore: resolveActivityInfo
activate VirtualCore
VirtualCore --> Hook_StartActivity
deactivate VirtualCore

Hook_StartActivity -> VRedirectActRequest: new VRedirectActRequest
activate VRedirectActRequest
VRedirectActRequest --> Hook_StartActivity: req
deactivate VRedirectActRequest

Hook_StartActivity -> VActivityManager: redirectTargetActivity
activate VActivityManager
VActivityManager -> VActivityManagerService: redirectTargetActivity
activate VActivityManagerService
VActivityManagerService -> VActivityManagerService: redirectTargetActivityLocked
activate VActivityManagerService
VActivityManagerService -> VActivityManagerService: startProcessLocked
activate VActivityManagerService
VActivityManagerService -> VActivityManagerService: queryFreeStubForProcess
activate VActivityManagerService
VActivityManagerService -> VActivityManagerService: performStartProcessLocked
activate VActivityManagerService
VActivityManagerService -> VPackageManagerService: querySharedPackages
activate VPackageManagerService
VPackageManagerService --> VActivityManagerService: sharedPackages : List<String>
deactivate VPackageManagerService
VActivityManagerService -> VPackageManagerService: queryContentProviders
activate VPackageManagerService
VPackageManagerService --> VActivityManagerService: providers : List<ProviderInfo>
deactivate VPackageManagerService
VActivityManagerService -> VPackageManagerService: getSharedLibraries
activate VPackageManagerService
VPackageManagerService --> VActivityManagerService: usesLibraries : List<String>
deactivate VPackageManagerService
VActivityManagerService -> ProviderCaller: call(MethodConstants.INIT_PROCESS)
activate ProviderCaller
ProviderCaller -> StubContentProvider: call
activate StubContentProvider
StubContentProvider -> StubContentProvider: initProcess
activate StubContentProvider
StubContentProvider --> ProviderCaller
deactivate StubContentProvider
ProviderCaller --> VActivityManagerService
deactivate ProviderCaller
deactivate VActivityManagerService
deactivate VActivityManagerService
deactivate VActivityManagerService
deactivate VActivityManagerService
deactivate VActivityManagerService
VActivityManagerService -> VActivityManagerService: fetchStubActivityInfo
activate VActivityManagerService
VActivityManagerService --> VActivityManager
deactivate VActivityManagerService
deactivate VActivityManager
VActivityManager --> Hook_StartActivity: result = new VActRedirectResult

note right of StubContentProvider
StubContentProvider.java中定义了20个静态内部类C1到C20，都是StubContentProvider的子类。并且在AndroidManifest.xml中声明了process字段，与对应的StubActivity一致。
VA的服务进程取出一个空的stubContentProvider，借助Android ContentProvider机制，系统会创建一个新进程出来，稍后被作为双开应用的容身之所。这个偷梁换柱的过程由VA服务进程完成。
end note

@enduml
```
